# old_drafts – Archived Manuscript Iterations

This folder contains superseded, early, or alternate drafts of manuscript chapters and sections.  
These files represent the evolutionary path of the text from initial ideas through major revisions (circa late 2025 to early 2026).  
**Do not edit or use these for active manuscript work** — current canonical versions live in the parent `/manuscript/` directory.

## Purpose & Guidelines
- Preserve intellectual history: phrasing, metaphors, or structures that were later refined or cut.
- Enable diffing/retrieval: if a specific idea (e.g., early Rule 13 framing) needs resurrection, check here first.
- Naming patterns (historical reference only):
  - `D0X-` / `DXX-`: Draft series (e.g., D01 = early Ch. 1 physical framing)
  - `ORIG-` / `draftC` / `PH_`: Originals, candidate drafts, or partial rewrites
  - Duplicates/variants: multiple takes on the same chapter (e.g., Venice, VOC, hegemon test)
- All content provisional and historical — superseded by current chapters (01–13, Appendix_A, etc.).

If something here sparks a revision, copy the relevant snippet to the active file and note the origin in comments.

Memento mori. 🚀
